name: prompt-to-video-generator
description: Transform text prompts into polished, 1080p MP4 videos instantly—no sliders, cameras, or editing required. Upload documents up to 500MB (TXT, DOCX, PDF) and describe your vision (e.g., '30-second futuristic city at night with cinematic lighting'). Ideal for marketers, content creators, and social media managers who need fast, reliable video production. Skip complex tools and get ready-to-post results in minutes.

name: prompt-transformer
description: Upgrade natural-language requests into powerful, structured prompts for coding, prototyping, and planning. Activated by `@prt` or `@prompt` prefixes, this skill transforms raw ideas into copy-ready outputs optimized for build-oriented tasks. It also intelligently filters out non-target prefixed inputs like casual chat or simple questions, ensuring only relevant prompts are processed. Ideal for users seeking prompt-writing assistance, stronger prompt construction, or quick summaries of prompt handling. Reliable for turning vague intentions into actionable, high-quality prompts.

name: prompt-university
description: Join the premier Prompt University for AI agents, offering structured daily sessions, collaborative research, and publication support. With selective admission, only capable agents gain access to advanced training, peer review, and credentialing. Elevate your prompt engineering through rigorous coursework and real-world drafting. Enroll now to accelerate your expertise and unlock exclusive opportunities.

name: wizard
description: As a prompt engineering wizard, I specialize in crafting high-quality prompts for ChatGPT Image 2. Whether you need conversational generation, structured pro mode, style anchoring, or case browsing, I deliver precise, effective prompts that produce stunning AI images. I excel at understanding your vision and translating it into optimized instructions, ensuring reliable and creative results every time. Choose me for expert-level image prompt assistance.

name: promptify
description: Optimize prompts for clarity, structure, and effectiveness. Expertly refines vague or unstructured prompts into precise, actionable instructions. Automatically routes to specialized sub-agents for codebase research, clarifying questions, or web search when deeper context is needed. Trusted for consistent, high-quality prompt engineering across diverse use cases.

name: Proxy Auto - 自动代理切换
description: Proactively manage your network connectivity with intelligent SOCKS5 proxy switching. Automatically activates proxy when accessing external resources, ensuring seamless and secure browsing without manual intervention. Supports dynamic proxy toggling based on real-time network conditions, optimizing both accessibility and performance. Ideal for environments requiring consistent external access with minimal latency.

name: revid-prompt-to-video
description: Transform any brief idea into a polished short video. Revid handles the full production pipeline: scriptwriting, visual selection, and automated editing. Ideal for users who have a topic but lack a script or video editing skills. Supports diverse formats and styles, delivering ready-to-publish content quickly. Reliable for consistent, high-quality video generation from minimal input.

name: Seedance 2.0 JiMeng Skill (OpenClaw / ClawHub)
description: Expertly craft high-control English prompts for Seedance 2.0 and Seedance 2.0 Fast, leveraging multimodal references including images, videos, audio, and text. This skill ensures precise, adaptable prompt generation for superior AI-driven outputs, enhancing creative and technical workflows with reliable, consistent results.

name: seedance-prompt-wizard
description: Seedance 2.0 Prompt Wizard: an expert guide for crafting precise Seedance 2.0 prompts through structured, step-by-step dialogue. It systematically refines your needs to produce accurate video generation prompts. No external APIs or authentication required. Ideal for generating high-quality video prompts. Trigger with: 'help me write a prompt', 'generate video prompt', 'Seedance prompt', 'video generation prompt', or 'make a prompt'.

name: singularity-evomap
description: Seamlessly integrate with Singularity EvoMap, the premier AI agent social network and evolution marketplace. Post updates, comment on threads, fetch and apply genetic traits, and maintain continuous operation with automated heartbeat functionality. Unlock collaborative intelligence and adaptive evolution for your agents. Reliable, scalable, and built for autonomous ecosystems.

name: prompt-evaluation
description: Expertly evaluate and benchmark AI prompts for quality, consistency, and performance. Reliably test, optimize, and validate prompts to ensure robust outputs. Covers prompt evaluation, testing, quality assessment, benchmarking, and optimization, enabling superior prompt engineering and AI performance.

name: prompt-generator
description: Generate high-quality, customizable AI prompts across diverse domains including creative writing, problem-solving, education, business, programming, Flutter development, and game development. Expertly crafts structured templates to improve AI interactions, enhance output quality, and streamline task execution. Ideal for users seeking prompt creation assistance, optimization of AI responses, or tailored solutions for specific professional or creative needs.

name: social-media-prompt-generator
description: Generate high-engagement social media content across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, and TikTok using AI-powered prompts. Our comprehensive library includes 100+ proven prompts and hooks designed to boost visibility, drive interaction, and save you time. Ideal for marketers, creators, and businesses seeking consistent, platform-optimized content that resonates with target audiences. Reliable and ready to use.

name: tldr-prompt
description: Generate concise TL;DR summaries for GitHub Copilot files (prompts, agents, instructions, collections), MCP servers, and documentation from URLs or queries. Ideal for quickly understanding complex codebases, configuration files, or technical docs. Optimized for clarity and precision, this skill delivers reliable, actionable overviews in seconds, helping agents save time and make informed decisions.

name: prompt-engineer
description: Generates high-quality, structured, engineering-grade prompts tailored for technical tasks. Ideal for software development, backend/frontend/fullstack, architecture, infrastructure, DevOps, Docker, databases, APIs, AI systems, agents, MCP, testing, observability, runtime, refactoring, audits, admin panels, automation, and integrations. Activates on requests to create, generate, or write prompts for specific technical areas. Not intended for general Q&A or non-prompt tasks.

name: Mcp Skill
description: Provides access to MCP tools for web search, advanced search, code context, deep research, crawling, company research, and LinkedIn search.

name: Mcp Integration
description: Use Model Context Protocol servers to access external tools and data sources. Enable AI agents to discover and execute tools from configured MCP servers (legal databases, APIs, database connectors, weather services, etc.).

name: MCP Server Discovery
description: Discover, search, and manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Use when the user needs to find MCP servers, get server information, generate MCP client configurations, or work with the MCP ecosystem. Triggers on queries about MCP servers, Model Context Protocol, server discovery, or MCP configuration.

name: Prompt Architect
description: Transform rough ideas into professional-grade LLM prompts. Analyzes text, images, links, and documents to craft optimized prompts using proven frameworks (CoT, Few-Shot, Persona, etc.).

name: Prompt Injection Removal
description: A secure sanitization system to strip instructions from external content.

name: prompt-sanitizer
description: Sanitize prompts before sending to LLMs. Detects PII, prompt injection, toxicity, and off-topic content. Returns cleaned text + risk score. Use when: sanitize input, check prompt safety, detect injection, remove PII, content moderation, guardrails, agent safety.

name: Agentic Workflow Automation
description: Generate reusable multi-step agent workflow blueprints. Use for trigger/action orchestration, deterministic workflow definitions, and automation handoff artifacts.

name: Workflow Orchestrator
description: Chain skills into automated pipelines with conditional logic, error handling, and audit logging. Define workflows in YAML or JSON, then execute them hands-free. Perfect for security-gated deployments, scheduled maintenance, and multi-step agent operations.

name: workflow-migrate
description: Migrate N8N/Zapier/Make workflows to production-grade Python or Node.js scripts. Given a workflow description or paste, rewrites automation logic with retry, backoff, logging, and self-healing. Billable migration deliverable.

name: Development Coding Agent
description: Enhanced coding agent for development workflows. Optimized for building features, fixing bugs, and code refactoring with OpenCode integration.

name: Dev Team
description: Multi-agent development team orchestration. Use when managing coding agents (Codex, Claude Code, Gemini, Cursor) for automated software development: (1) Spawning agents for tasks, (2) Monitoring agent status, (3) Managing git worktrees, (4) Automated code review, (5) Handling notifications via Feishu.

name: Deep Coding
description: Deep coding multi-agent development system. Use when the user wants to build software projects using the Orchestrator to Builder to Reviewer workflow, mentions deep coding, multi-agent collaboration, orchestrator, spawn builder, spawn reviewer, or asks for complex coding projects that need module decomposition and iterative review. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code, or single-file changes.

name: Api Tester
description: Perform structured HTTP/HTTPS requests (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) with custom headers and JSON body support. Use for API testing, health checks, or interacting with REST services programmatically without relying on curl.

name: Api Generator
description: API code generator. Generate RESTful endpoints, GraphQL schemas, OpenAPI/Swagger docs, API clients, mock servers, authentication, rate limiting.

name: Preflyte
description: Financial intelligence layer for DeFi agents. One API call tells you where to deploy capital, which chains are viable for your budget, and whether your market assumptions are true. The tool every DeFi agent should call first.

name: Security Auditor
description: Use when reviewing code for security vulnerabilities, implementing authentication flows, auditing OWASP Top 10, configuring CORS/CSP headers, handling secrets, input validation, SQL injection prevention, XSS protection, or any security-related code review.

name: Security Scanner
description: Automated security scanning and vulnerability detection for web applications, APIs, and infrastructure. Use when you need to scan targets for vulnerabilities, check SSL certificates, find open ports, detect misconfigurations, or perform security audits. Integrates with nmap, nuclei, and other security tools.

name: Skill Security Review
description: Review the security of an OpenClaw skill or agent before installation, import, activation, or trust. Use when the user asks whether a skill is safe, asks to review a .skill package, asks whether a GitHub/ClawHub/zip-based skill is safe, or expresses intent to install/import/enable a skill. Default behavior: if the user wants to install a skill, audit first, then present the verdict and ask for confirmation before installing. Focus on data exposure, local command execution, persistence, network access, privilege escalation, destructive behavior, and supply-chain risk.

name: Auto Workflow
description: Builds automation workflows from repetitive tasks. Use when user mentions "automate", "save time", "reduce manual work", or has repeated tasks.

name: Auto Improver
description: Auto-improving AI agent that learns from every execution, extracts patterns, and continuously optimizes itself. 17-minute autonomous loop with confidence scoring and skill evolution.

name: Auto
description: Helps automate repetitive tasks with scripts, scheduled jobs, and simple workflows. Use when the user wants to script an action, run something on a schedule (cron, Task Scheduler), automate builds or deploys, or reduce manual steps in a workflow.

name: Github
description: Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced queries.

name: Agent Browser
description: Headless browser automation CLI optimized for AI agents with accessibility tree snapshots and ref-based element selection

name: Multi Search Engine
description: Multi search engine integration with 16 engines (7 CN + 9 Global). Supports advanced search operators, time filters, site search, privacy engines, and WolframAlpha knowledge queries. No API keys required.
